sentences.chinese: 荊王劉賈者，諸劉，不知其何屬初起時。
sentences.literal: King Jing Liu Jia was one of the various Liu clansmen; no one knows which branch he belonged to during the initial uprising.

sentences.chinese: 漢王元年，還定三秦，劉賈為將軍，定塞地，從東擊項籍。
sentences.literal: In the first year of the Han King, after pacifying the Three Qins, Liu Jia served as general, secured the border regions, and followed east to attack Xiang Yu.

sentences.chinese: 漢四年，漢王之敗成皋，北渡河，得張耳、韓信軍，軍修武，深溝高壘，使劉賈將二萬人，騎數百，渡白馬津入楚地，燒其積聚，以破其業，無以給項王軍食。
sentences.literal: In Han year 4, when the Han King was defeated at Chenggao and crossed north over the river, obtaining the armies of Zhang Er and Han Xin, he stationed at Xiuwu with deep moats and high ramparts, commanding Liu Jia to lead 20,000 men and several hundred cavalry across the Baima Ford into Chu territory, burning their grain stores to disrupt their livelihoods and prevent them from supplying Xiang Yu's army with food.

sentences.chinese: 已而楚兵擊劉賈，賈輒壁不肯與戰，而與彭越相保。
sentences.literal: Soon after, Chu troops attacked Liu Jia, but Jia entrenched himself and refused to fight, instead holding out with Peng Yue.

sentences.chinese: 漢五年，漢王追項籍至固陵，使劉賈南渡淮圍壽春。
sentences.literal: In Han year 5, the Han King pursued Xiang Yu to Gulang, commanding Liu Jia to cross south over the Huai and besiege Shouchun.

sentences.chinese: 還至，使人閒招楚大司馬周殷。
sentences.literal: On the return, he sent agents to secretly recruit Chu's Grand Marshal Zhou Yin.

sentences.chinese: 周殷反楚，佐劉賈舉九江，迎武王黥布兵，皆會垓下，共擊項籍。
sentences.literal: Zhou Yin defected from Chu and assisted Liu Jia in capturing Jiujiang, welcoming King Wu Ying Bu's troops, all gathering at Gaixia to jointly attack Xiang Yu.

sentences.chinese: 漢王因使劉賈將九江兵，與太尉盧綰西南擊臨江王共尉。
sentences.literal: The Han King then commanded Liu Jia to lead the Jiujiang troops southwest with Grand Marshal Lu Wan to attack King Linjiang Gong Wei.

sentences.chinese: 共尉已死，以臨江為南郡。
sentences.literal: Gong Wei had already died, so Linjiang was made into Nanguo commandery.

sentences.chinese: 漢六年春，會諸侯於陳，廢楚王信，囚之，分其地為二國。
sentences.literal: In spring of Han year 6, he assembled the feudal lords at Chen, deposed King Chu Xin, imprisoned him, and divided his territory into two kingdoms.

sentences.chinese: 當是時也，高祖子幼，昆弟少，又不賢，欲王同姓以鎮天下，乃詔曰：「將軍劉賈有功，及擇子弟可以為王者。」
sentences.literal: At this time, Gaozu's sons were young, his brothers few, and moreover not worthy, so he wished to enfeoff kings from the same surname to stabilize the realm. He issued an edict saying: 'General Liu Jia has merit, and I will select clansmen who can be made kings.'

sentences.chinese: 群臣皆曰：「立劉賈為荊王，王淮東五十二城；
sentences.literal: All the ministers said: 'Establish Liu Jia as King of Jing, ruling over 52 cities east of the Huai;

sentences.chinese: 高祖弟交為楚王，王淮西三十六城。」
sentences.literal: Gaozu's younger brother Jiao as King of Chu, ruling over 36 cities west of the Huai.'
He then established his son Fei as King of Qi.
This began the enfeoffment of brothers from the Liu clan.
